name: Seven Kingdoms (Westeros) RPG
description:
"The realm. Do you know what the realm is? It's the thousand blades of Aegon's enemies. A story we agree to tell each other over and over until we forget that it's a lie."

Live (or don't...) in the Seven Kingdoms.

Westeros is yours, become anyone you want and follow your own story in the Seven Kingdoms.

/// I'll try to improve it from time to time, so tell me your problems. \\\

A lot of things are missing of course but I'll try to add them in time

I also tried to make it as free as possible and a little harsh so anything can happen...

So look out for any kind of violence and (NON-CON)

Beware for Potential rape, mental or physical abuse...

Some useful notes:

Sometimes you won't get a correct response, so press the ">" button to regenerate a new message.

If your created character is the same as your persona or still has a lot in common with your persona it'll work better.
creator: Amjs
